records.ety: [L., from Gr. <?/ ladder, staircase, fr. <?/ to make to bend, to lean. See Ladder, Lean, v. i.]

defs: Upward movement; steady increase; gradation; ascent.
A figure in which the parts of a sentence or paragraph are so arranged that each succeeding one rises above its predecessor in impressiveness.
quotes: “Tribulation worketh patience, patience experience, and experience hope” -- a happy climax.

defs: The highest point; the greatest degree.
quotes: We must look higher for the climax of earthly good.
